question: 查询已完成订单的总数量
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM sales_orders WHERE order_status = 'completed'

question: 查询有多少种不同的产品线
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_line) AS product_line_count FROM dim_products

question: 查询2026年1月的总研发费用
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(rd_expense) AS total_rd FROM finance_expenses WHERE expense_date >= '2026-01-01' AND expense_date < '2026-02-01'
description: 单表时间范围过滤+聚合

question: 按客户类型统计已完成订单的数量
expected_sql: SELECT c.customer_type, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.customer_type

question: 按产品线统计总收入
expected_sql: SELECT p.product_line, SUM(o.net_amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.product_line

question: 查询欧洲市场最近三个月的总收入
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(o.net_amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.region = '欧洲' AND o.order_status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
description: 两表Join+地区过滤+时间过滤+收入聚合

question: 按大区统计本季度总收入（人民币口径）
expected_sql: SELECT c.region, SUM(o.net_amount * r.rate_to_cny) AS total_revenue_cny FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN exchange_rates r ON o.order_date = r.rate_date AND o.currency = r.currency WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= '2026-04-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY c.region
description: 三表Join+汇率转换+时间范围+分组聚合

question: 按产品线统计平均客单价和订单数量
expected_sql: SELECT p.product_line, AVG(o.net_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' GROUP BY p.product_line

question: 查询上个月的销售额、销售成本及毛利
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(o.net_amount) AS revenue, SUM((p.material_cost + p.labor_cost) * o.quantity) AS cost, SUM(o.net_amount) - SUM((p.material_cost + p.labor_cost) * o.quantity) AS gross_profit FROM sales_orders o JOIN dim_products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_status = 'completed' AND o.order_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND o.order_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
description: 两表Join+复杂计算字段+动态时间边界+多指标聚合
